prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 2440、2418、2786、3263、2914 名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 470 名；2025 年基准位次约 2914 名，较 2024 年有所回升；本省物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 106、101、103、105、108 人，总体小幅扩招；2026 年计划 107 人，较 2025 年微幅缩招约 0.9%，对竞争格局影响极小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2021–2024 年稳居第 9 名，2025–2026 年升至第 8 名，学校层次稳中有升；2026 年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，事件总数 99 条（正面 3、负面 64、中性 32），主要涉及校园安全、师德师风、学术不端等舆情，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第 19（高热），短视频曝光量大，吸引关注；历史投档异常方面，2023 年湖南文科投档线 633 分属高关注，但物理类未见明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上共 20 个，包括法学 A+、马克思主义理论 A+、地球物理学 A+、测绘科学与技术 A+、水利工程 A、生物学 A、计算机科学与技术 A- 等，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等专业 2026 年社会热度为高热推荐/推荐，与武汉大学优势学科高度匹配；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 60.98 万，按近年比例估算物理类约 36.48 万，较 2025 年 36.30 万略有增加，竞争略加剧；2026 年；武汉大学位于湖北省，非河北省本省高校，无本地招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026 年招生计划微幅缩招、本省考生数略增、学校层次稳中有升（软科第 8）、声誉偏负面与抖音高热相互对冲，在 2025 年基准 2914 名基础上预计位次基本持平；预测最低位次约2898名，区间2568–3228名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 2440, 2418, 2786, 3263, and 2914, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 470 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2914, which has rebounded compared to 2024; the provincial enrollment plans for the Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 106, 101, 103, 105, and 108 respectively, indicating a slight overall expansion; the 2026 plan is 107, a slight reduction of about 0.9% compared to 2025, which has minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking remained stable at 9th from 2021 to 2024, rising to 8th in 2025-2026, showing a steady improvement in school level; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, with a total of 99 events (3 positive, 64 negative, 32 neutral), mainly involving campus safety, teacher ethics, academic misconduct, etc., which may slightly suppress some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 19th (high heat), with high short video exposure attracting attention; regarding historical admission anomalies, the 2023 Hunan liberal arts admission score of 633 points attracted high attention, but no obvious gaps were recorded for the Physics Category; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Geophysics A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A+, Water Conservancy Engineering A, Biology A, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine are highly recommended/recommended in 2026, highly matching Wuhan University's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 609,800, with an estimated Physics Category of about 364,800 based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 363,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; 2026; Wuhan University is located in Hubei Province, not a local university in Hebei Province, so there is no local enrollment preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in the number of provincial candidates, the steady improvement in school level (Soft Science 8th), the negative reputation and high Douyin heat offsetting each other, based on the 2025 baseline of 2914, the ranking is expected to remain basically unchanged; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2898, with a range of 2568–3228.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2568–3228, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2600), you can focus on aiming for top majors such as Hongyi Academy, 8-year Clinical Medicine, and Artificial Intelligence; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 3200), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options and be cautious about aiming for Tier 1 majors.
